subcodes.first_line: The horizon of utterance hath dawned forth from the Sun of My remembrance, the All-Glorious, the Inaccessible. We make mention of him who hath turned unto the Countenance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد لاح افق البیان من شمس ذکری العزیز المنیع انا نذکر من اقبل الی الوجه و
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @praise and encouragement, @call to action
